data.name: Sex, Please
data.detailed_description:
Warning! ADULT ONLY!

"Sex, Please" contains scenes of sex and ultraviolence!

By launching the game, you take upon the sole responsibility for any possible negative consequences you may suffer after experiencing the game's content.




This game is about a thrash Streamer, who for the sake of donations sneaks into a sex shop during a live broadcast.

A mysterious subscriber offers Streamer a lot of money in exchange for performing strange tasks.

Will Streamer lose his soul or his anal virginity in this adventure?

Key Features:

A unique story combining horror and porn thriller;
Sex Shop and Hell atmosphere;
Sex scenes with various sex dolls and sex toys;
Juicy Graphics;
The setting is the Sex with the Devil universe;
Communication with the Doctor.

data.short_description: ADULT ONLY! This is a unique arthouse project that combines elements of porn, psychological thriller, horror, and musical.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 260 / Radeon HD 4850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
  • 備註: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 670 / AMD Radeon HD 7990
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible
  • 備註: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVidia GeForce GTX 260 / Radeon HD 4850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible
  • Additional Notes: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVidia GeForce GTX 670 / AMD Radeon HD 7990
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX Compatible
  • Additional Notes: You may need to update the driver for your video card and sound card
